title: Haryana ITI Admission 2026

detail.title: Haryana ITI Admission 2026
detail.short_info: Haryana ITI Admission 2026 online application form will start soon for session 2026-27. Check important dates, application fee, eligibility criteria, merit list, trades and apply online at admissions.itiharyana.gov.in. Free for girls.

content.text: The online application form for Haryana ITI Admission 2026 will open soon. The Skill Development & Industrial Training Department, Haryana has announced admissions for the session 2026-27 in 199 Government and 186 Private ITIs across the state.

Haryana ITI Admission 2026 offers admission to various Engineering and Non-Engineering trades in Government and Private Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs). Admission is merit-based on marks obtained in Class 8th, 10th, or 12th. The process is fully online through the official portal.

rows: Skill Development & Industrial Training Department, Haryana

content.text: Age Limit: Minimum 14 years as on 01 September 2026 (no upper age limit for most trades). Educational Qualification: Passed 8th, 10th, or 12th class from a recognized board (trade-specific requirements apply). Domicile: Preference given to Haryana domicile candidates.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Haryana ITI Admission 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Submit and take printout of the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Haryana ITI Admission 2026

items: Income Certificate, Ex-Serviceman Certificate, NCC Certificate, etc.
